title: Simple Item Delete
description: Allows players to delete items from their inventory using the delete key.
body:
Effortlessly manage your inventory by deleting items with a single keybind. Includes a safety "Undo" feature to restore accidental deletions!

## How to use

Hover over any item in your inventory and use the following key combinations (Default key: **DELETE**):

*   **[DELETE]**: Deletes the full stack you are hovering over.
*   **[SHIFT] + [DELETE]**: Deletes a single item from the stack.
*   **[CTRL] + [DELETE]**: **Undo!** Restores the last item/stack you deleted.

## Configuration

You can rebind the delete key to any button you prefer in the Minecraft **Options > Controls > Key Binds** menu under the "Simple Item Delete" category.

## Supports:
Fabric version 1.15.0 and up.

## Have an issue or a suggestion?
[SUBMIT IT HERE](https://github.com/obeme-qq/simple-item-delete/issues)
